hooks.command: REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && cd "$REPO_ROOT" && git status --porcelain -- canopy-cli roots-cli roots-parser roots-core roots-storage roots-context canopy-llm canopy-core 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && cargo install --path canopy-cli && cargo install --path roots-cli || true
